# Slide-60 B-tree (order m=3). Used by the search tests. Also the "before"
# tree for the insert X=55 example.
#
# Format (blank lines and '#' comments ignored):
#   root <id>
#   <id> <numKeys> <A[0]> <K[1]> <A[1]> [<K[2]> <A[2]> ...]
#
#                       [30]                      a (root)
#                     /      \
#                 [20]        [40]                b   c
#                /    \       /    \
#          [10,15]  [25] [35,38]  [45,50]         d  e  f  g
#
# ids:  a=1  b=2  c=3  d=4  e=5  f=6  g=7
root 1
1  1  2  30 3
2  1  4  20 5
3  1  6  40 7
4  2  0  10 0  15 0
5  1  0  25 0
6  2  0  35 0  38 0
7  2  0  45 0  50 0
